resources.string: List-detail adaptive scaffold that rearranges panes by window size.
List-detail scaffold with an additional extra pane.
List-detail scaffold with an extra pane shown as a dialog.
Supporting-pane adaptive scaffold with main and supporting content plus an optional extra pane.
Supporting-pane scaffold with an extra pane as a bottom sheet.
List-detail layout integrated with Navigation 2.
List-detail layout integrated with Navigation 3.
Navigation bar items demonstrating dot and numeric badges.
Modal bottom sheet that slides up over the content.
Basic bottom sheet scaffold with expandable sheet content.
Bottom sheet scaffold with nested scroll coordination.
Default filled button.
Filled button whose shape animates on press.
Square-shaped filled button.
Small-sized filled button.
Elevated button with shadow elevation.
Elevated button with an animated shape on press.
Filled tonal button using secondary container colors.
Filled tonal button with an animated shape on press.
Outlined button with a border and transparent fill.
Outlined button with an animated shape on press.
Text-only button without a filled container.
Text button with an animated shape on press.
Filled button with a leading icon.
Extra-small filled button with a leading icon.
Medium filled button with a leading icon.
Large filled button with a leading icon.
Extra-large filled button with a leading icon.
Standard button group container.
Connected button group for single selection with flow layout.
Connected button group for multi-selection with flow layout.
Vertically arranged button group.
Basic filled card layout.
Filled card that responds to click.
Elevated card with shadow.
Elevated card that responds to click.
Outlined card with a border.
Outlined card that responds to click.
Horizontal multi-browse carousel for large visual content.
Horizontal uncontained carousel that bleeds past edges.
Horizontal carousel with a centered hero item.
Multi-browse carousel with masked items and an assist chip that fades in as its item grows.
Carousel that includes a show-all action.
Carousel-style LazyRow with mixed aspect ratios.
Basic checkbox control.
Checkbox paired with a text label.
Checkbox with rounded stroke styling.
Tri-state checkbox with checked, unchecked, and indeterminate states.
Tri-state checkbox with rounded strokes.
Assist chip for contextual actions.
Elevated assist chip with shadow.
Filter chip for selecting filters.
Elevated filter chip with shadow.
Filter chip with a leading icon.
Filter chip with a trailing icon.
Filter chip with custom content spacing.
Input chip representing user input.
Input chip that includes an avatar.
Suggestion chip for recommended actions.
Elevated suggestion chip with shadow.
Single-line horizontal group of chips.
Chip group that reflows onto multiple lines.
Inline date picker for selecting a date.
Date picker presented in a dialog.
Date picker with restricted selectable dates.
Date input field for typing a date.
Date range picker for start and end dates.
Basic alert dialog with text and actions.
Alert dialog with an icon above its title.
Minimal basic alert dialog.
Simple bottom app bar with a single menu action.
Bottom app bar that hosts a floating action button.
Bottom app bar with overflow menu actions.
Bottom app bar that exits on scroll.
Exit-always bottom app bar with space-around arrangement.
Exit-always bottom app bar with space-between arrangement.
Exit-always bottom app bar with space-evenly arrangement.
Fixed exit-always bottom app bar layout.
Fixed exit-always bottom app bar with vibrant colors.
Simple top app bar with title and actions.
Top app bar with actions that adapt to available width.
Top app bar that includes a subtitle.
Center-aligned top app bar.
Center-aligned top app bar with a subtitle.
Pinned top app bar that stays visible while scrolling.
Pinned top app bar above a pre-scrolled list.
Pinned top app bar with a reversed lazy grid.
Top app bar that hides as content scrolls up and reappears as content scrolls down.
Enter-always top app bar with reverse scrolling.
Medium collapsible top app bar that shrinks on scroll.
Medium flexible collapsible top app bar with subtitle.
Large collapsible top app bar that shrinks on scroll.
Large flexible collapsible top app bar with subtitle.
Custom two-row top app bar layout.
Horizontal floating toolbar that expands and collapses.
Horizontal floating toolbar with overflow actions.
Horizontal floating toolbar that hides toward the bottom in response to scrolling.
Vertical floating toolbar that expands and collapses.
Vertical floating toolbar with overflow actions.
Vertical floating toolbar that hides toward the end edge in response to scrolling.
Horizontal floating toolbar combined with a FAB.
Centered horizontal floating toolbar with a FAB.
Horizontal floating toolbar used as the scaffold FAB.
Vertical floating toolbar combined with a FAB.
Centered vertical floating toolbar with a FAB.
Extended FAB with icon and text label.
Small extended FAB with icon and label.
Medium extended FAB with icon and label.
Large extended FAB with icon and label.
Extended FAB that shows only a text label.
Small text-only extended FAB.
Medium text-only extended FAB.
Large text-only extended FAB.
Extended FAB that animates between expanded and collapsed.
Small animated extended FAB.
Medium animated extended FAB.
Large animated extended FAB.
Standard floating action button.
Large floating action button.
FAB with show and hide animation.
Medium floating action button.
Small floating action button.
FAB menu that reveals additional actions.
List item with a single line of text.
List item with primary and supporting text.
Three-line list item with overline and supporting text.
Three-line list item with extended supporting text.
List item that handles click events.
Clickable list item containing a nested clickable child.
List that supports single-item selection.
List that supports multi-item selection.
List item that changes mode on long press.
Segmented list with single selection.
Segmented list with multi selection.
Segmented list item that expands for more content.
Standard icon button.
Icon button with a custom tint.
Toggleable icon button.
Filled icon button with a solid container.

Outlined toggleable icon button.
Extra-small narrow square filled icon button.
Medium round wide icon button.
Large round outlined icon button with uniform size.
Indeterminate loading indicator.
Contained loading indicator inside a surface.
Determinate loading indicator with progress.
Determinate contained loading indicator with progress.
Pull-to-refresh using a loading indicator.
Basic dropdown menu.
Dropdown menu with grouped sections.
Scrollable dropdown menu with scroll state.
Exposed dropdown menu for selecting an option.
Editable exposed dropdown menu with text input.
Multi-select autocomplete exposed dropdown menu.

Short navigation bar with horizontal items.
Standard bottom navigation bar.

Collapsed wide navigation rail.
Expanded wide navigation rail.
Wide navigation rail with different item arrangements.
Standard navigation rail.
Navigation rail with bottom-aligned actions.
Modal navigation drawer overlay.
Permanent navigation drawer always on screen.
Dismissible navigation drawer.
Navigation suite scaffold that adapts navigation type.
Navigation suite scaffold with custom configuration.
Determinate linear progress indicator.
Wavy linear progress indicator.
Indeterminate linear progress indicator.
Indeterminate wavy linear progress indicator.
Determinate circular progress indicator.
Wavy circular progress indicator.
Indeterminate circular progress indicator.
Indeterminate wavy circular progress indicator.
Standard pull-to-refresh on a scrollable list.
Pull-to-refresh using a loading indicator.
Pull-to-refresh with scaling indicator animation.
Pull-to-refresh driven by custom state.
Pull-to-refresh wired through a ViewModel.
Custom refresh indicator with the default transform.
Two radio buttons demonstrating exclusive selection.
Group of radio buttons for exclusive selection.
Simple search bar input.
Full-screen search bar scaffold.
Docked search bar scaffold.
Segmented button for single selection.
Segmented button for multi selection.
Basic toggle button.
Square toggle button that becomes round when checked.

Tonal toggle button.
Outlined toggle button.
Toggle button with an icon.

Medium toggle button with an icon.
Large toggle button with an icon.

Continuous slider for selecting a value.
Slider with discrete steps.
Slider with a custom thumb.
Slider with custom track and thumb.
Slider track decorated with icons.
Centered slider with a midpoint origin.
Vertical discrete slider with animated snapping between steps.
Vertical centered slider.
Range slider for selecting a value range.
Range slider with discrete steps.
Range slider with custom track and thumb components.
Scaffold that shows a simple snackbar.
Scaffold with an indefinite snackbar.
Scaffold with a custom snackbar layout.
Snackbar shown using coroutines.
Snackbar that displays multiline text.
Filled split button with leading and trailing actions.
Split button whose trailing part is not checkable.
Split button that opens a dropdown menu.
Tonal split button variant.
Elevated split button with shadow.
Outlined split button with a border.
Split button labeled with text.
Split button that uses icons.
Extra-small filled split button.
Medium filled split button.
Large filled split button.
Extra-large filled split button.
Basic on/off switch.
Switch whose thumb shows an icon.
Primary tabs with text labels.
Primary tabs with icons.
Secondary tabs with text labels.
Secondary tabs with icons.
Tabs that combine text and icons.
Tabs with leading icons and text.
Scrollable primary text tabs.
Scrollable secondary text tabs.
Custom-styled fancy tabs.
Tabs with a custom fancy indicator.
Tabs with a fancy indicator container.
Scrollable tabs with a fancy indicator container.
Time picker for selecting hours and minutes.
Time input fields for typing a time.
Time picker that switches between picker and input modes.
Basic filled text field.
Text field with an initial value and selection.
Basic outlined text field.
Outlined text field with an initial value and selection.
Text field that accepts up to 10 digits and formats them as a phone number.
Text field with leading and trailing icons.
Text field that shows placeholder text.
Text field with prefix and suffix text.
Text field displayed in an error state.
Text field with supporting helper text.
Dense text field with reduced content padding.
Password text field with visibility toggle.
Text field that hides the keyboard on IME action.
Multi-line text area input.
Plain tooltip anchored to a control.
Plain tooltip shown through manual invocation.
Plain tooltip that includes a caret.
Plain tooltip with caret placed below the anchor.
Plain tooltip with caret to the left of the anchor.
Plain tooltip with caret to the right of the anchor.
Plain tooltip with caret at the start of the anchor.
Plain tooltip with caret at the end of the anchor.
Plain tooltip with a custom caret shape.
Rich tooltip with title and supporting content.
Rich tooltip shown through manual invocation.
Rich tooltip that includes a caret.
Rich tooltip with a custom caret shape.
Gallery of Material shapes.
A list item that dismisses when swiped from end to start and resets after the opposite swipe.
